title: Rework Event
description: Canonical schema for rework events — deployments that represent remediation rather than forward progress. Used to compute Rework Rate and distinguish healthy deployments from corrective work.

event_type.description: Discriminant for event routing. Must be 'rework'.

deployment_sha.description: Full SHA of the deployment commit that constitutes rework.

triggered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the rework was deployed.

user_visible.description: Whether the rework is visible to end users (true) or an internal/corrective change (false).
